channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Neverness to Everness version 1.1 update ‘Dreamwalk Corridor’ launches June 3
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone

Coming soon to Steam, Epic Games Store, Galaxy Store, and GeForce NOW.

The version 1.1 update for free-to-play supernatural urban open-world action RPG Neverness to Everness, dubbed “Dreamwalk Corridor,” will launch on June 3, publisher Perfect World Games and developer Hotta Studio announced. The game will also be coming to PC via Steam and Epic Games Store, Android via Galaxy Store, and NVIDIA’s GeForce NOW streaming service.

Here is an overview of the update, via Perfect World Games:

  • New Episode
    • Dreamwalk Corridor
  • New Locations
    • Sunward Island
    • Corridor of Echoes
  • New Characters
    • Lacrimosa (Attribute: Chaos, Compatible Arc: Liquid)
    • Chaos (Attribute: Lakshana, Compatible Arc: Condensate)
  • Limited Boards
    • Fading Reverie (Lacrimosa) – June 3 to 24
    • Forsaken Path (Chaos) – June 24 to July 8
  • Arc Research Program
    • Nocturne Special (The Last Rose)
    • Pursuit Special (What’s Desired)
  • New Outfits
    • Lacrimosa – Yesterday’s Melody
    • Lacrimosa – Nightingale‘s Crescendo
    • Lacrimosa – Gilded Rhapsody
    • Lacrimosa – Piano Key Sonatina
    • Lacrimosa – New Moon Lullaby
    • Chaos – Clear Skies
    • Chaos – Never Skip
  • New City Hangouts
    • Lacrimosa
    • Chaos
  • Rewards at a Glance
    • Circle Gift
    • Hetherau Special Gift Pack
    • Redeem Codes
      • DREAMWALK0603 – Expires June 25
      • TOMATO100 – Expires June 25
      • RACENOLIMIT – Expires June 25
  • New Collaborations
    • Porsche Collaboration – Coming Soon
  • New Vehicle
    • Porsche 918 Spyder
  • New Property
    • Pegasus Residence
  • New Collaboration Outfit
    • Appraiser – Perfect Partners
  • New Gameplay
    • Bagel SNS
    • Fight Club
    • Underground Circuit
  • New High-Risk Commission
    • Mist Pursuit
  • New Anomaly Pilgrimage
    • Hethereau Debt Collector
  • New Version Events
    • What’s Baking – The kitchen’s open. Become a Bagel creator today! (June 3 to July 8)
    • Underground Circuit – Strap in, weapons hot: six racers, one finish line. (June 3 to July 8)
    • Sunward Travelouge – Welcome to Sunward Island! (June 3 to July 8)
    • The Long Dream – The 12th measure of the finale… Lacrimosa! Time to wake up! (June 3 to July 8)
    • Beyond the Rails: Uncharted Circle – Dear passengers, welcome aboard Hethereau’s Anomaly Metro “Ghost Train.” To ensure your safety and that of other passengers, please strictly follow the “Ghost Train Passenger Manual” and ride courteously. We wish you a pleasant journey. (June 4 to 18)
    • Fons Rush – During the event, spend City Stamina in Hethereau Hobbies activities to earn double the Fons. (June 8 to 15)
    • Hunter’s Crucible – Steel is forged in fire. Hunters are forged by worthier prey. (June 18 to July 8)
    • Fight Champions – In here, we let our fists do the talking. (June 24 to July 8)
    • Pixel Surge – During the event, spend Character Pixels in “Houdinii’s Magic Stage,” “Houdinii’s Schemes,” “Bubble Can Factory,” and “Rabbit Hole” to receive double rewards. (June 26 to July 30)
  • Special Bulletin
    • Coming Soon to Steam, Epic Games Store, Galaxy Store, and NVIDIA GeForce NOW
  • Character Optimizations
    • Chaos
    • Iroi
    • Zankou
  • Optimization Roadmap
    • Improve controller responsiveness and feel.
    • Improve mobile performance and fix compatibility issues on select Android devices.
    • Add support for vehicle auto-drive.
    • Add phone customization, with swappable menu Ul and phone model
    • Add an option to mute Taygedo during story cutscenes.
    • Add plot summaries when skipping cutscenes in the main story episodes or spinoffs.
    • Add new fast-travel points: The Witch’s House and Pink Paws Bank HQ.
    • Add new mod parts for existing vehicles, raise the customization cap, and improve handling.
    • Tune starting stats on several vehicles for better baseline han-dling.
    • Add height adjustment for the 3rd-person vehicle camera.
    • Add repeat mode and volume controls to the Portable Player.
    • Fix several intermittent player housing-related bugs.
    • NPC bystanders now react when you take selfies.
    • Tune critical dodge detection to better match visual cues.
    • Improve skill queuing for groups of enemies.
    • Chiz gains a new Life Skill that highlights all collectibles in Pink Paws Heist.
    • Improve controls and usability in the Tetrominoes mini-game
    • Add a cosmetics menu to Little Sparrow, plus general bug fixes.
    • Fix misaligned musical notes and occasional unresponsive inputs in the Super Sound mini-game.
    • Improve the results screen in the Owner’s Selection mini-game; players can now jump straight into the next level.
    • Add a toggle for auto-restock in The Cafe by Origen.
    • Fix various intermittent bugs and improve overall stability.

Neverness to Everness is available now for PlayStation 5, PC, iOS, and Android on April 23 in China and April 29 worldwide.

Watch the version 1.1 preview program and a new trailer below.

Version 1.1 Preview Special Program

English

Japanese

Korean

Porsche Collaboration Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Korean



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/neverness-to-everness-version-1-1-update-dreamwalk-corridor-launches-june-3
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: EXSTETRA remaster launches September 30 for PC; PS5, Switch 2, and Switch versions in development
item.content:encoded:
The recently announced remastered version of fantasy RPG EXSTETRA will launch for PC via Steam on July 30 worldwide, developer FuRyu announced. PlayStation 5, Switch 2, and Switch versions are also in development. It supports English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options.

EXSTETRA originally launched for PS Vita and 3DS on November 7, 2013 in Japan. The remaster will mark the first time the game is released outside of Japan.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

A fantasy RPG where a kiss saves the world. EXSTETRA is set in “Amazea,” a Tokyo fused with another world and fated for destruction.

It tells the story of Ryoma, a high school student who rises as the chosen savior, a “Prisma,” to confront the coming end of the world.

Along the way, Ryoma discovers candidates to become “Prisma Knights,” who share the same destiny of saving the world. By awakening them with his kiss, he sets out on an adventure together with his companions.

Story

Just kiss—.

Kiss is the only way to save two worlds destined for ruin.

Set in “Amazea,” a Tokyo fused with another world and fated for destruction, this is the story of a battle in which you become the chosen savior, a “Prisma,” and fight to save two worlds from the brink of annihilation.

The only way to save the world is a kiss—.

World

The story takes place in “Amazia,” a Tokyo fused with another world and is burdened with a doomed fate.

This beautiful yet decadent world is brought to life through the artwork by tokyogenso.

Witness for yourself the transformed city such as Shibuya and Akihabara, now merged with another world.

Battle

The only way to save the world… is a kiss!

Fight against the end of the world alongside the Prisma Knights.

  • EXS – As the savior; “Prisma,” the protagonist is the only one capable of absorbing the energy known as “EXS” by defeating enemies.
    “EXS,” the source of power in this world, can be shared with the Prisma Knights—his allies—through a kiss.
  • The Power of a Kiss – The act required to share “EXS” is a kiss. A kiss awakens the Prisma Knights and serves as the key to fighting together as companions.
  • Enchant – “Enchanting” is a system that allows players to grant various abilities and special effects to equipment. It is a vital element in gaining the upper hand in battle, and gathering materials while maintaining the optimal setup is the shortest path to victory.

(This product was developed based on EXSTETRA, originally released in 2013. Some specifications differ from the original version.)

Watch the opening movie below.

Opening Movie



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/exstetra-remaster-launches-september-30-for-pc-ps5-switch-2-and-switch-versions-in-development
